intro.title: Introduction
intro.text: Maison des Bozos ("we", "our") is committed to protecting your privacy. This policy explains how we handle information when you visit our website maisondesbozos.com.

collection.title: Personal Data Collection
collection.text: We do not collect any personally identifiable information when you browse our site. We do not use cookies to track your behavior or create user profiles.

analytics.title: Website Analytics
analytics.text: We use Fathom Analytics, a privacy-respecting analytics service. Fathom is designed to be GDPR and Quebec Law 25 compliant without requiring consent. Here's what Fathom does NOT do:

thirdParty.title: Third-Party Services
thirdParty.text: Our site may contain links to third-party services (ticketing, social media). These services have their own privacy policies and we encourage you to review them.

rights.title: Your Rights
rights.text: Under Quebec's Law 25, you have the right to access, rectify, and delete your personal data. Since we do not collect personal data, these rights do not apply to our site.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.text: If you have any questions about this privacy policy, you can reach us at:
